title: elaeagnus montana var. ovata
intro: Elaeagnus montana var. ovata, also known as silverberry or Russian olive, is a deciduous shrub native to the mountainous regions of Asia and Europe. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Elaeagnus montana var. ovata include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
